summary: Loop prevention fix verified. All critical features working: provider status appears exactly once on load, single prompt creates single generation, input/button disabled during generation, no auto-submit on page refresh, regenerate button triggers single run.
critical_code_review_comments: Module-level locks (_initLock, _genLock, _currentRunId, _providerCheckedForProject) correctly prevent concurrent/duplicate calls
initCalledFor ref in IDEWorkspace.tsx prevents strict mode/HMR double-init
sendingRef in PromptComposer prevents Enter+click double-fire
genPhase state machine (idle/preparing/generating/applying_files/completed/failed) properly gates new runs
Terminal does NOT restore from localStorage - starts fresh each session to avoid repeated log confusion
Run IDs (run_xxx) are generated and logged for each generation
Input and button correctly disabled during active generation (verified via DOM property check)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loop prevention verified working. Frontend route is /project/:id. Provider status checked once per project (cached in _providerCheckedForProject). Module-level locks survive React re-renders. Terminal shows unique run IDs for each generation. Generation takes 15-30s typically.

backend./api/provider/status: PASS - Returns provider config, idempotent across multiple calls
backend./api/generate (continuation): PASS - Accepts fileTree for follow-up prompts
backend./api/projects/:id (authenticated): PASS - Returns project data with session

frontend_loop_prevention.Provider status appears once on load: PASS - Count verified as 1, stable after 5s wait
frontend_loop_prevention.Single prompt = single '$> Prompt' entry: PASS - Triple Enter resulted in only 1 submission
frontend_loop_prevention.Input disabled during generation: PASS - Verified via DOM property (input.disabled === true)
frontend_loop_prevention.Button disabled during generation: PASS - Verified via DOM property (button.disabled === true)
frontend_loop_prevention.No auto-submit on page refresh: PASS - Refresh restores messages but does not trigger generation
frontend_loop_prevention.No additional provider logs after wait: PASS - Provider count stable after 5-10 second waits
frontend_loop_prevention.Run IDs in terminal: PASS - Shows 'Run created: run_xxx' with unique IDs
frontend_loop_prevention.Generation completion logged: PASS - Shows 'Generation complete' and 'Run xxx: completed'

loop_prevention_mechanisms_verified._initLock: Module-level lock prevents concurrent initProject calls
loop_prevention_mechanisms_verified._genLock: Module-level lock prevents concurrent sendPrompt calls
loop_prevention_mechanisms_verified._providerCheckedForProject: Tracks which project already had provider checked (cached)
loop_prevention_mechanisms_verified._currentRunId: Tracks active run, ignores stale callbacks
loop_prevention_mechanisms_verified.initCalledFor ref: Prevents strict mode/HMR double-init in IDEWorkspace.tsx
loop_prevention_mechanisms_verified.sendingRef: Local ref in PromptComposer prevents Enter+click double-fire
